title: Add rollout tests that run Architect -> Plan -> Tasks -> Dry-run Execution end to end
summary: Add rollout tests that run Architect -> Plan -> Tasks -> Dry-run Execution end to end
acceptanceCriteria: Work graph dependencies can be planned into executable batches.
Dry-run reports include commands, policies, approvals, and expected artifacts.
Completed artifacts can update execution and validation state.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
